zh.lifeSummary: Sir John Arundell VIII of Bideford是John Arundell VII和Margaret Burghersh的兒子，於大約1421年出生在英國戴文比德福德。他於1446年11月與Elizabeth Morley在英國英格蘭可瓦爾結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他在英國格盧斯特斯爾福藍普頓 白 希雷斯特被列為knight。他去世於1473年11月12日在英國可瓦爾藍黑爾享年53歲，埋葬在英國多瑟特希德奧可聖 吉盧也 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sir John Arundell VIII of Bideford是John Arundell VII和Margaret Burghersh的儿子，于大约1421年出生在英国戴文比德福德。他于1446年11月与Elizabeth Morley在英国英格兰可瓦爾结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他在英国格盧斯特斯爾福藍普頓 白 希雷斯特被列为knight。他去世于1473年11月12日在英国可瓦爾藍黑爾享年53岁，埋葬在英国多瑟特希德奧可聖 吉盧也 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Arundell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Arundel
meanings: (of Norman origin): nickname from Old French arondel ‘little swallow’ (a diminutive of arond ‘swallow’, from Latin hirundo).

habitational name from a place so named in West Sussex, from Old English hārhūne ‘horehound’ (a wild plant, Marrubium vulgare) + dell ‘valley’. This place is the seat of the dukes of Norfolk. In northern England, folk etymology resulted in variants such as Arendale .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: Sir John Arundell VIII of Bideford was born about 1421, in Bideford, Devon, England as the son of John Arundell VII and Margaret Burghersh. He married Elizabeth Morley in November 1446, in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. His occupation is listed as knight in Frampton by Cirencester, Gloucestershire, England. He died on 12 November 1473, in Lanherne, Cornwall, England, at the age of 53, and was buried in St Giles' Church, Chideock, Dorset, England.

fr.St Giles' Church, Chideock, Dorset, Engl: St Giles' Church, Chideock, Dorset, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Sir John Arundell VIII of Bideford est né environ 1421, à Bideford, Devon, Angleterre, fils de John Arundell VII et Margaret Burghersh. Il a épousé Elizabeth Morley en novembre 1446, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Sa profession de son indiquée est knight à Frampton by Cirencester, Gloucestershire, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 12 novembre 1473, à Lanherne, Cornouailles, Angleterre, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterré à St Giles' Church, Chideock, Dorset, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Sir John Arundell VIII of Bideford wurde um 1421 in Bideford, Devon, England, als Sohn von John Arundell VII und Margaret Burghersh geboren. Er hat im November 1446 in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Morley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. sein Beruf ist als knight in Frampton by Cirencester, Gloucestershire, England aufgeführt. Er starb am 12. November 1473 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Lanherne, Cornwall, England und wurde in St Giles' Church, Chideock, Dorset, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Sir John Arundell VIII of Bideford è nato il circa 1421 nel Bideford, Devon, England come figlio di John Arundell VII e Margaret Burghersh. Lui sposato Elizabeth Morley nel novembre 1446, nel Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. La sua occupazione è indicata come knight nel Frampton by Cirencester, Gloucestershire, England. Morì il 12 novembre 1473, nel Lanherne, Cornwall, England, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolto a St Giles' Church, Chideock, Dorset, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Arundell VIII of Bidefordは約1421年にイギリスデボンビデフォードでJohn Arundell VIIとMargaret Burghershの息子として生まれた。1446年11月にイギリスイギリスコルンワルでElizabeth Morleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアフランプトン ビー シアーエンセスターでの職業はknightと記録されている。彼は1473年11月12日にイギリスコルンワルランハーンで53歳で死去し，イギリスドールセトチデオックスト ギレス' チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.St Giles' Church, Chideock, Dorset, Engl: 영국 도르세트 치데오c크 스트 길스' c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Arundell VIII of Bideford(은)는 대략 1421년 영국 데폰 비데퍼드에서 John Arundell VII(와)과 Margaret Burghersh의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1446년 11월 영국 잉글랜드 코른월에서 Elizabeth Morley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국 그루스스터실르 프램프턴 비 시렌스스터에서 knight이었다. 그는 1473년 11월 12일 영국 코른월 랜헤른에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 도르세트 치데오c크 스트 길스' c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.St Giles' Church, Chideock, Dorset, Engl: St Giles' Church, Chideock, Dorset, Inglaterra
pt.lifeSummary: Sir John Arundell VIII of Bideford nasceu aproximadamente 1421, em Bideford, Devon, Inglaterra filho de John Arundell VII e Margaret Burghersh. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Morley em novembro de 1446, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Sua profissão aparece como knight em Frampton by Cirencester, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 12 de novembro de 1473, em Lanherne, Cornwall, Inglaterra, com 53 anos, e foi sepultado em St Giles' Church, Chideock, Dorset, Inglaterra.

ru.St Giles' Church, Chideock, Dorset, Engl: ст джилес' чурч, чидеокк, дорсет, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Sir John Arundell VIII of Bideford родился около 1421 г. в местности бидефорд, девон, Англия. Его родителей звали John Arundell VII и Margaret Burghersh. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Morley ноябрь 1446 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь.  Он работал по профессии knight в местности фрамптон би сиренсестир, глоусестиршир, Англия. Он умер 12 ноября 1473 г. в местности ланирн, корнвалл, Англия в возрасте 53 лет и был похоронен в местности ст джилес' чурч, чидеокк, дорсет, Англия.

es.St Giles' Church, Chideock, Dorset, Engl: St Giles' Church, Chideock, Dorset, Inglaterra
es.lifeSummary: Sir John Arundell VIII of Bideford nació aproximadamente 1421, en Bideford, Devon, Inglaterra como hijo de John Arundell VII y Margaret Burghersh. Se casó con Elizabeth Morley en noviembre de 1446, en Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Su ocupación registrada era knight en Frampton by Cirencester, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Murió el 12 de noviembre de 1473, en Lanherne, Cornwall, Inglaterra, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultado en St Giles' Church, Chideock, Dorset, Inglaterra.
